name: Tasty Veggie Spirelli Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Leonardo Veggie Spirelli (cooked and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the onion and vinegar and let it stand for a few minutes.
2. Add the mayonnaise, salt, pepper, and paprika to the onion mixture. Mix well.
3. In a large salad bowl, combine the veggie spirelli, tomatoes, green pepper, and olives.
4. Pour the mayonnaise mixture over the vegetables.
5. Toss lightly to ensure even distribution of dressing.
6. Chill the salad for several hours before serving.
7. When ready to serve, garnish with egg slices and parsley. Makes 6 servings.
